title: FastLeaves+
description: This resource pack replaces the solid black parts of the leaves with darker green ones when using fast graphics.
body:
![FastLeaves+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ebaa2e11b30c2341af49dc18cbb0b85c5e9a743.png)
# Fast Leaves Plus 1.14-1.20+

This resource pack replaces the solid black parts of the leaves with darker green ones when using fast graphics.

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b10f9c5ece8a64b62e31062f6bcec79ca185aba5.png)
